app.title: Color Matcher
app.subtitle: Browser cameras · comparison and mix via API

camera.sameDeviceWarn: Same device as the other panel — often only one video works. Pick different cameras.
camera.placeholder: Select a camera and allow access in the browser
camera.heldHint: Snapshot — compare the marker with the color on screen
camera.roiHintLive: Color sampling region on the frame

roi.polygonOpen: Click points on the frame. Close by clicking the first point.

mix.title: Mixing and comparison
mix.deltaEHint: Visual difference: <2 — almost match, 2–5 — noticeable, >10 — very different.
mix.pigmentsTitle: Which pigments to add to the palette
mix.pigmentsIntro: Up to three paints from your set that best shift the current palette color toward the sample. Percents are relative importance, not exact volumes.
mix.startWith: Start with {{name}} ({{percent}}%) — add gradually and re-sample the palette.

errors.matchNeedsColors: Target and palette colors are required
errors.noMediaDevices: Browser does not support camera access
